calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-07-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Carol Mayeda appearing via zoom for Mark Iwanaga (trustee).

Mrs. Mayeda stated that much of the trust administration takes place in San Francisco. Second amended petition for order confirming trustee and trust asset is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Svahlin. Not reported.
